summary: Iteration 7: College Comparison Feature tested. Found and fixed a critical route ordering bug in server.py — /colleges/compare was defined AFTER /colleges/{college_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'compare' as a college_id and return 400 instead of 401. Fixed by moving /colleges/compare route before /colleges/{college_id}. All 6 backend tests pass, all frontend comparison features work correctly.

critical.issue: Route defined after /colleges/{college_id} — FastAPI matched 'compare' as college_id param, returning 400 'Invalid college ID' instead of 401. FIXED by reordering routes.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: /api/colleges/compare route was placed after /colleges/{college_id} in server.py — FastAPI matched 'compare' as a path param. Moved compare route before the parameterized route.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 complete. College Comparison feature fully working. Critical bug fixed: /colleges/compare route ordering in server.py (was after /{college_id}, now before). Frontend: compare toggles on each card (data-testid='compare-toggle-{name}'), sticky bar (data-testid='compare-sticky-bar'), start-compare-btn, clear-compare-btn all work. ComparePage at /compare?ids=... renders all 10 rows (division/location/conference/foreign_friendly/acceptance_rate/ranking/scholarship_info/coaches/tracking/website), compare-remove/email/view buttons all functional. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_compare.py
rca_of_issue: FastAPI route registration is order-dependent. /colleges/compare must be registered BEFORE /colleges/{college_id}. When compare was last, FastAPI matched the path /colleges/compare with the parameterized route, treating 'compare' as college_id, then ObjectId('compare') raised an exception → 400 before auth ran.
